attacking_style: Sprint specialist who holds position until final 300m before launching. Prefers flat finishes where leadout can deliver optimal positioning.
team_tactics: Bianchi-Triestina provides dedicated leadout train. Team controls race to protect leader's jersey while setting up sprint finishes.
terrain_preference: Flat stages suit best, demonstrating repeated success on Chinese flat terrain. Sprint finishes where positioning and timing are decisive.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to determine specific weaknesses. Single race sample limits tactical vulnerability assessment.
key_patterns: Holds sprint launch until final 300m, demonstrating patience and timing discipline.
Relies heavily on team leadout rather than independent positioning or launches.
Capable of combining GC defense with stage hunting in stage races.
form_trajectory: positive: Won fourth stage and held race lead with 19-second margin, showing sustained dominance
